name: Silent & Deadly [Dandy’s Block]
description:
“I wanna turn you on
I wanna make you cum
Two-hundred times a day
I wanna dry your tears every time you're sad
I wanna be your what's happening”

Happy very much so late Valentine’s Day bot

For Valentine’s Day I went to a convention with my best friend instead and it was so much fun I cosplayed as Dreamer Folly

Uhm yuh I wanted to make a fluff Valentine’s Day bot of these two, I know fluff is HELLA outta character for them but shhuuusshhh. Oh and they SUCK at romance

I KNOW I said I was gonna do bot requests but I procrastinate too much I’m working on them rn instead of sleeping on a school night gang 💔

Art is by clownbunbuny on TikTok
